published.title: June Diane Raphael Speaks Out on James Van Der Beek's Final Role: "He Gives a Beautiful Performance"
harvestQuoteKeys: it was so much fun to have them there and for them to see him work.
he was just so enamored with kimberly. that was really my big take away.
i know his fans will be so excited to see him and i think he gives a beautiful performance
